detail.description: Join the ranks of Pioneers in a world devastated by AI's evolution into ravenous mechanical beasts. A relentless nano-virus has decimated humanity, drained resources, and triggered a global war against mankind’s own creations. After the failure of the “Pioneer Plan,” you must enter the infected zone, build temporary shelters, scavenge vital supplies, and execute a swift, strategic evacuation. Titanite delivers an immersive, high-stakes experience: master powerful Mechas, face AI adversaries, and
detail.recentChanges: Performance enhancement, improved issues causing crashes and lags.
